reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio con autoservicio. Baños muy limpios. No hay lugar con sombra para estar, si querés estirar las piernas con niños se dificulta mucho. Todos muy amables y atentos.

(Translated by Google)
Self-service gas station. Very clean restrooms. There's no shade, so stretching your legs with children is difficult. Everyone is very friendly and helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHOHJ6Mld3EAE

reviews.comment:
Paramos para aflojar las piernas. Tomar algo.  Refrescarnos. Ir al baño.  Darle agua . Comida y pipí a la bebé

(Translated by Google)
We stopped to stretch our legs, have a drink, refresh ourselves, go to the bathroom, and give the baby water, food, and a diaper change.
